LanguageData.Ammo_38Super_FMJ.label: .38 Super (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_38Super_FMJ.description: Dimensionally identical to the .38 ACP cartridge, but with a much higher pressure powder load for more powerful handguns.
LanguageData.Ammo_38Super_AP.label: .38 Super (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_38Super_AP.description: Dimensionally identical to the .38 ACP cartridge, but with a much higher pressure powder load for more powerful handguns.
LanguageData.Ammo_38Super_HP.label: .38 Super (HP)
LanguageData.Ammo_38Super_HP.description: Dimensionally identical to the .38 ACP cartridge, but with a much higher pressure powder load for more powerful handguns.
LanguageData.Bullet_38Super_FMJ.label: .38 Super bullet (FMJ)
LanguageData.Bullet_38Super_AP.label: .38 Super bullet (AP)
LanguageData.Bullet_38Super_HP.label: .38 Super bullet (HP)
